rationale: Confirmed the fix (75e82b52..19bc8114) touches only internal/complete/panel_advisory.go + panel_advisory_test.go. The four exported signatures are byte-identical: ScanOrphanedClosedBeads/ClosedEpicBeadIDs live untouched in internal/lifecycle/orphans.go (not in the diff at all); CheckPendingObligations(beadID string, getMeta func(string)(map[string]interface{}, error)) error (line 613) and PanelGateRoots(root, wtPath, specID string) []string (line 634) are unchanged. uncoveredPendingObligations (line 522) remains the single shared unexported core, still returning ([]uncoveredPendingEntry, error) — the fix only inserted two comma-ok present-null guards inside its existing body. Both CheckPendingObligations (line 614) and reconcilePendingRefutations (line 681) still call this same core directly; reconcile does not call the erroring exported predicate. No new import was added — the import block at the top of the file is untouched, and the diff stat shows edits confined to the two files. go build ./... and go vet ./internal/complete both ran clean with no output. git status --porcelain shows only the untracked reviews/ directory for this round. No signature drift, shared-core breakage, or new dependency edge that would affect Bead 2's future approve→lifecycle/approve→complete acyclicity.
